contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Pointed HSpace.Core HSpace.Coherent.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types Pointed HSpace.Core HSpace.Coherent.

(** * Pointwise H-space structures *)

(** Whenever [X] is an H-space, so is the type of maps into [X]. *)

Instance ishspace_map `{Funext} (X : pType) (Y : Type)
  `{IsHSpace X} : IsHSpace [Y -> X, const pt].

goals.conclusion: IsHSpace [Y -> X, const pt]

contents: (* Note: When writing [f * g], Coq only finds this instance if [f] is explicitly in the pointed type [[Y -> X, const pt]]. *)

goals.conclusion: IsHSpace [Y -> X, const pt]
SgOp [Y -> X, const pt]
LeftIdentity ?hspace_op pt
RightIdentity ?hspace_op pt
SgOp [Y -> X, const pt]

contents: exact (fun f g y => (f y) * (g y)).

goals.conclusion: LeftIdentity (fun (f g : [Y -> X, const pt]) (y : Y) => f y * g y) pt
pt y * g y = g y
RightIdentity (fun (f g : [Y -> X, const pt]) (y : Y) => f y * g y) pt
f y * pt y = f y

contents: (** If [X] is coherent, so is [[Y -> X, const pt]]. *)

Instance iscoherent_ishspace_map `{Funext} (X : pType) (Y : Type)
  `{IsCoherent X} : IsCoherent [Y -> X, const pt].

goals.conclusion: IsCoherent [Y -> X, const pt]
IsCoherent [Y -> X, const pt]

path_forall (fun y : Y => const pt y * const pt y) 
  (const pt) (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (const pt y)) =
path_forall (fun y : Y => const pt y * const pt y) 
  (const pt) (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (const pt y))

(fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (const pt y)) =
(fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (const pt y))

contents: (** If [X] is left-invertible, so is [[Y -> X, const pt]]. *)

goals.conclusion: forall f : [Y -> X, const pt], IsEquiv (sg_op f)
forall f : [Y -> X, const pt], IsEquiv (sg_op f)
IsEquiv (fun (g : Y -> X) (y : Y) => f y * g y)

contents:
exact (isequiv_functor_forall (P:=const X) (f:=idmap)
           (g:=fun y gy => (f y) * gy)).
(** For the type of pointed maps [Y ->** X], coherence of [X] is needed even to get a non-coherent H-space structure on [Y ->** X]. *)

Instance ishspace_pmap `{Funext} (X Y : pType) `{IsCoherent X}
  : IsHSpace (Y ->** X).

goals.conclusion: IsHSpace (Y ->** X)
IsHSpace (Y ->** X)
SgOp (Y ->** X)
LeftIdentity ?hspace_op pt
RightIdentity ?hspace_op pt
SgOp (Y ->** X)
Y -> X
?f pt = pt
Y -> X
(fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (g y)) pt = pt
hspace_op (f pt) (g pt) = pt
hspace_op (f pt) pt = pt
pt * pt = pt

LeftIdentity
  ((fun f g : Y ->** X =>
    Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (g y))
      (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq g) @
       (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
        hspace_left_identity pt
        :
        hspace_op (f pt) pt = pt)
       :
       (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (g y)) pt = pt))
   :
   SgOp (Y ->** X))
  pt

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
  (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) =
g

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
  (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==*
g

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
  (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
g

?p pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
     (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
      (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
       hspace_left_identity pt))) @
(dpoint_eq g)^

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
  (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
g
hspace_op pt (g y) = g y

((fun y : Y =>
  hspace_left_identity (g y)
  :
  Build_pMap (fun y0 : Y => hspace_op (pt y0) (g y0))
    (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
     (ap (fun y0 : pfam_const X pt => y0 * pt) (point_eq pt) @
      hspace_left_identity pt))
    y =
  g y)
 :
 Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
   (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
    (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
     hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
 g) pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (pt y) (g y))
     (ap (hspace_op (pt pt)) (point_eq g) @
      (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq pt) @
       hspace_left_identity pt))) @
(dpoint_eq g)^

hspace_left_identity (g pt) =
(ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq g) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
(dpoint_eq g)^

hspace_left_identity (g pt) @ dpoint_eq g =
ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq g) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)

RightIdentity
  ((fun f g : Y ->** X =>
    Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (g y))
      (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq g) @
       (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
        hspace_left_identity pt
        :
        hspace_op (f pt) pt = pt)
       :
       (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (g y)) pt = pt))
   :
   SgOp (Y ->** X))
  pt

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
  (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) =
f

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
  (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==*
f

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
  (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
f

?p pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
     (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
      (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
       hspace_left_identity pt))) @
(dpoint_eq f)^

Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
  (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
   (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
    hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
f
hspace_op (f y) pt = f y

((fun y : Y =>
  hspace_right_identity (f y)
  :
  Build_pMap (fun y0 : Y => hspace_op (f y0) (pt y0))
    (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
     (ap (fun y0 : pfam_const X pt => y0 * pt) (point_eq f) @
      hspace_left_identity pt))
    y =
  f y)
 :
 Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
   (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
    (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
     hspace_left_identity pt)) ==
 f) pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pMap (fun y : Y => hspace_op (f y) (pt y))
     (ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq pt) @
      (ap (fun y : pfam_const X pt => y * pt) (point_eq f) @
       hspace_left_identity pt))) @
(dpoint_eq f)^
hspace_right_identity pt = (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ 1
(1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ 1 = hspace_right_identity pt
hspace_left_identity pt = hspace_right_identity pt

Instance iscoherent_hspace_pmap `{Funext} (X Y : pType) `{IsCoherent X}
  : IsCoherent (Y ->** X).

goals.conclusion: IsCoherent (Y ->** X)
IsCoherent (Y ->** X)

contents: (* Note that [pt] sometimes means the constant map [Y ->* X]. *)

goals.conclusion: left_identity pt = right_identity pt

Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
  (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
     (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
     ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^) =
Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
  (paths_ind_r pt
     (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
      hspace_right_identity y =
      (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
     (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      iscoherent)^
     (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))

Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
  (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
     (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
     ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^) ==*
Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
  (paths_ind_r pt
     (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
      hspace_right_identity y =
      (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
     (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      iscoherent)^
     (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))

Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
  (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
     (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
     ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^) ==
Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
  (paths_ind_r pt
     (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
      hspace_right_identity y =
      (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
     (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      iscoherent)^
     (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))

?p pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
     (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
        (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
        ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
         concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^)) @
(dpoint_eq
   (Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
      (paths_ind_r pt
         (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
          hspace_right_identity y =
          (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
         (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
            concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
           concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
          iscoherent)^
         (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))))^

Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
  (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
     (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
     ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^) ==
Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
  (paths_ind_r pt
     (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
      hspace_right_identity y =
      (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
     (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
      iscoherent)^
     (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))
hspace_left_identity pt = hspace_right_identity pt

((fun y : Y =>
  iscoherent
  :
  Build_pHomotopy (fun y0 : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y0))
    (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
       (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
       ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^)
    y =
  Build_pHomotopy (fun y0 : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y0))
    (paths_ind_r pt
       (fun (y0 : X) (p : y0 = pt) =>
        hspace_right_identity y0 =
        (1 @ (ap (fun y1 : X => y1 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
       (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
          concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
         concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        iscoherent)^
       (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))
    y)
 :
 Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
   (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
      (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
      ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^) ==
 Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
   (paths_ind_r pt
      (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
       hspace_right_identity y =
       (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
      (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
         concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
        concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
       iscoherent)^
      (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt)))
  pt =
dpoint_eq
  (Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_left_identity (pt y))
     (moveL_pV (dpoint_eq pt) (hspace_left_identity (pt pt))
        (ap (hspace_op pt) (point_eq pt) @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt))
        ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
         concat_A1p hspace_left_identity (dpoint_eq pt))^)) @
(dpoint_eq
   (Build_pHomotopy (fun y : Y => hspace_right_identity (pt y))
      (paths_ind_r pt
         (fun (y : X) (p : y = pt) =>
          hspace_right_identity y =
          (1 @ (ap (fun y0 : X => y0 * pt) p @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @ p^)
         (((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
            concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
           concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
          iscoherent)^
         (pt pt) (dpoint_eq pt))))^

iscoherent =
(((concat_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^ @
  ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^) @
 (concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)))^) @
((((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
    concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
  iscoherent)^)^

forall isc : left_identity pt = right_identity pt,
isc =
(((concat_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^ @
  ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^) @
 (concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)))^) @
((((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
    concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
  isc)^)^

forall isc : hspace_left_identity pt = hspace_right_identity pt,
isc =
(((concat_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^ @
  ((1 @@ concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p_p1 (hspace_left_identity pt))^) @
 (concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)))^) @
((((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
    concat_1p (1 @ hspace_left_identity pt)) @
   concat_1p (hspace_left_identity pt)) @
  isc)^)^

contents: (* The next line is essentially the same as [generalize], but for some reason that tactic doesn't work here. *)

goals.conclusion:
forall isc : p = hspace_right_identity pt,
isc =
(((concat_p1 p)^ @ ((1 @@ concat_1p p) @ concat_1p_p1 p)^) @
 (concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ p)))^) @
((((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ p)) @ concat_1p (1 @ p)) @ concat_1p p) @ isc)^)^

1 =
(((concat_p1 p)^ @ ((1 @@ concat_1p p) @ concat_1p_p1 p)^) @
 (concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ p)))^) @
((((concat_p1 (1 @ (1 @ p)) @ concat_1p (1 @ p)) @ concat_1p p) @ 1)^)^

contents: (** If the H-space structure on [X] is left-invertible, so is the one induced on [Y ->** X]. *)

goals.conclusion: forall f : Y ->** X, IsEquiv (sg_op f)
forall f : Y ->** X, IsEquiv (sg_op f)
IsEquiv (sg_op f)
forall a : Y, pfam_const X a <~> pfam_const X a
?f pt (dpoint (pfam_const X)) = dpoint (pfam_const X)
equiv_functor_pforall_id ?f ?p == sg_op f
forall a : Y, pfam_const X a <~> pfam_const X a

(fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a)) pt (dpoint (pfam_const X)) =
dpoint (pfam_const X)
f pt * pt = pt

equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
  (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f
   :
   (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a)) pt (dpoint (pfam_const X)) =
   dpoint (pfam_const X)) ==
sg_op f

equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
  (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g =
f * g

equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
  (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g ==
f * g

?p pt =
dpoint_eq
  (equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
     (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g) @
(dpoint_eq (f * g))^

equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
  (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g ==
f * g
f y * g y = hspace_op (f y) (g y)

((fun y : Y =>
  1
  :
  equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
    (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g y =
  (f * g) y)
 :
 equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
   (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g ==
 f * g) pt =
dpoint_eq
  (equiv_functor_pforall_id (fun a : Y => equiv_hspace_left_op (f a))
     (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f) g) @
(dpoint_eq (f * g))^

1 =
(ap (sg_op (f pt)) (dpoint_eq g) @ (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f)) @
(ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq g) @
 (ap (fun y : X => y * pt) (point_eq f) @ hspace_left_identity pt))^

ap (hspace_op (f pt)) (point_eq g) @
(ap (fun y : X => y * pt) (point_eq f) @ hspace_left_identity pt) =
ap (sg_op (f pt)) (dpoint_eq g) @ (right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f)

ap (fun y : X => y * pt) (point_eq f) @ hspace_left_identity pt =
right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f

ap (fun y : X => y * pt) (point_eq f) @ right_identity pt =
right_identity (f pt) @ point_eq f
